records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.5 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent ordered sparse m16n8k64 signed INT8 inline PTX in the combined coverage kernel
stages.detail: The production generated_intrinsics route produced 242,464-byte compute_80 NVVM IR with SHA-256 fcc2fe1a6200de7b5ab8a38cab847432669fe4d6ce823c81b73f9b18fa25144c and 68,600-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 aa011070e20cb91d99f0d6d41ffd3883f01031b44d171380f638e3674b2facf3. All eight raw variants use compile-time selector 0.

stages.representation: combined sparse INT8 coverage kernel with ordered m16n8k64 calls
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 23,656-byte cubin with SHA-256 8a09455f87f3ef0c7c16adf13bf6030cbe7f0f18df7fcd91ec2a19a10de5b50d. Disassembly contained 30 IMMA.SP instructions in total and exactly 10 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions: all eight raw variants plus two compatibility-path calls.
